Echo Messenger

A highly fault-tolerant, zero-server E2EE messenger engineered for absolute communication resilience. Supports standard P2P, robust anti-DPI tunneling, and offline mesh networking (WiFi NAN, BLE, LoRa hardware).

Currently it serves 0 apps. To add it to your F-Droid app, scan the QR code (click it to enlarge) or use this link:

https://github.io/theravanz/echo-fdroid-repo/repo

If you would like to manually verify the fingerprint (SHA-256) of the repository signing key, here it is:
C9 9F 03 2E D9 4C 8D 9C D9 32 EB 0E F8 76 D8 32 48 E3 F3 D0 77 E0 77 F9 96 4E E1 AE E2 EC 7D 0B
